scope: Port API-core retry, HTTP wrapper, error mapping, and stream watchdog primitives into AgenC LLM runtime

requiredBehaviors: construct request URLs from a provider base URL plus request path
merge default and request headers without leaking provider-specific auth policy into the generic layer
serialize plain request bodies as JSON and parse JSON responses
leave native BodyInit payload content-type untouched so fetch can apply protocol-specific headers
retry stale socket fetch failures while preserving AbortError as terminal
edgeCases: base URLs with existing path prefixes
JSON error bodies with nested error.message
socket hang up retry versus caller abort

requiredBehaviors: use base 500ms exponential backoff with 25 percent jitter
abort retrying when Retry-After exceeds the 300000ms maximum wait
carry parsed context-overflow data and maxTokensOverride into the next retry attempt
retry max-token context-overflow adjustments immediately without backoff sleep
edgeCases: custom retryStatuses can disable generic 5xx retries

requiredBehaviors: classify rate limit, overload, timeout, auth, media-size, prompt-too-long, and context-overflow failures
parse prompt-too-long token counts and over-limit gap
map neutral API errors into runtime LLM error classes
edgeCases: prompt-too-long strings wrapped in provider prefixes

requiredBehaviors: expose the API-core stream-idle watchdog through the llm/api namespace
preserve half-time warning and hard abort reasons
reuse AgenC's monotonic shared watchdog implementation
